headline: Platform engineer bringing cloud, DevOps, and GenAI systems into enterprise insurance
title: Lead GenAI Platform Engineer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn profile and authored LinkedIn transition post match Tony Morris to Progressive Insurance, cloud/DevOps architecture, and GenAI platform engineering; exact lead seniority comes from the attendee row.
bioMarkdown: Platform engineer at Progressive working at the intersection of GenAI, cloud architecture, DevOps, and enterprise insurance systems. Good match for conversations on hands-on AI platform work inside large regulated organizations.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies Tony Morris as an enterprise architect, cloud and DevOps leader, and principal engineer at Progressive Insurance.

primary.label: LinkedIn transition post
primary.note: Authored post says he joined Progressive Insurance as a GenAI Platform Engineer after Sherwin-Williams.

secondary.label: LinkedIn directory result
secondary.note: Directory result repeats the Progressive Insurance affiliation and cloud/DevOps/principal-engineer positioning.

headline: AI and AWS practice leader helping enterprise and retail organizations operationalize AI
title: Managing Director - CapNexus Applied Intelligence
confidenceNote: CapNexus leadership page, CapNexus launch release, LinkedIn, and LinkedIn posts consistently identify Tony Santiago as Managing Director and Global Head of AI and AWS Practice at CapNexus in the Miami area.
bioMarkdown: Managing Director and AI/AWS practice leader at CapNexus, focused on moving enterprise and retail AI programs from pilots into governed, production-ready operations.

primary.label: CapNexus about page
primary.note: Official leadership page lists Tony Santiago as Managing Director, Global Head of AI & AWS Practice.

primary.note: Public profile identifies Tony Santiago as Managing Director, AI Practice Leader, ex-AWS, at CapNexus in the Miami-Fort Lauderdale area.

primary.note: Company release says Tony Santiago was appointed Managing Director, Global Head of AI & AWS Practice.

secondary.label: Pulse 2.0 CapNexus launch coverage
secondary.note: Coverage of the CapNexus launch repeats Tony Santiago's Managing Director and Global Head of AI and AWS Practice appointment.

secondary.note: Public post describes Tony Santiago as leading CapNexus's AI and AWS practice and writing about scaling AI beyond pilots.
